credentials: MA 1978 U Rochester, Eastman Sch Music
name: Paul ROWE

ratings.comment: As a student in the voice department, I could not be more pleased with the training I have received with Prof. Rowe. He knows exactly how to pin-point an issue and drives his students to overcome their personal obstacles. He is fair, cultured, a historian at heart, and his voice is breathtaking. A wonderful mentor!

Paul has been my voice teacher for 4 years and has completely changed my voice for the better. He not only teaches proper technique, he inspires. I will miss weekly lessons so much... I don't want to graduate.
